name: papyrus
description: A Pretext-powered responsive newspaper layout lab.

scripts.test:bdd:agent-live: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 poetry run behave features_backend/console-agent-live.feature --tags=@live-agent
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend/console-agent-live.feature --tags=@live-agent
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:hello: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend/console-agent-live.feature --tags=@live-agent --name "The console agent responds to hello"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:docs: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend/console-agent-live.feature --tags=@live-agent --name "The console agent discovers resource documentation progressively"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:create: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend/console-agent-live.feature --tags=@live-agent --name "The console agent creates a research Assignment"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:get: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend/console-agent-live.feature --tags=@live-agent --name "The console agent can fetch Assignment info"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:update: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend/console-agent-live.feature --tags=@live-agent --name "The console agent can update Assignment status"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:error-shape: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend/console-agent-live.feature --tags=@live-agent --name "The console agent returns structured error shape for invalid Assignment input"
